Issue Description: BTC billing address displays account password in plain text
Details: BTC billing address field shows 'content2' which is the login password. Password is visible and editable by any logged-in user.
Impact: High - Password exposure allows account takeover by anyone with dashboard access.
Recommendation: Remove password from BTC address field. Implement proper wallet address validation. Store passwords hashed and never display them.

Details: Phone number (+79132456234) and email (sergey25288@gmail.com) displayed in full without masking or access controls.
Impact: Medium - PII exposure violates privacy regulations (GDPR/CCPA).
Recommendation: Mask sensitive data (show last 4 digits only). Add access controls and audit logging for PII access.

Details: After successful login to /statistics navigating to /settings or /workers redirects back to login form. Session cookie or token not maintained.
Impact: High - Users cannot access dashboard features without repeated login.
Recommendation: Fix session management. Ensure cookies/tokens are properly set with correct domain and path attributes.

Details: Worker 'worker4' shows last activity date '13.05.2024' - nearly 2 years old. Data retention policy unclear.
Impact: Medium - Stale data suggests database cleanup issues or abandoned accounts.
Recommendation: Implement data retention policy. Archive or remove inactive workers after defined period.

Details: About page contains '------' instead of actual company description and information.
Impact: Medium - Unprofessional appearance damages credibility and trust.
Recommendation: Replace all placeholder content with actual company information.

Details: 'Total accrued: 0' displayed despite table showing historical profit entries. Chart data not synchronized with table data.
Impact: Medium - Financial data inconsistency undermines user trust.
Recommendation: Sync chart data with actual transaction records. Fix data pipeline between backend and frontend.

Details: All referral metrics show 'n/a': Level n/a Balance n/a BTC hashrate n/a TH/s. Referral link unavailable.
Recommendation: Implement proper referral tracking. Display actual referral data or show 'No referrals yet' message.

Details: All pages show 'Copyright 2022' instead of current year 2026.
Recommendation: Update copyright year dynamically or manually to current year.

Details: Referral link address shows 'link address is unavaila...' - text truncated without tooltip or expansion option.
Impact: Low - Users cannot see full referral link.
Recommendation: Add tooltip on hover or wrap text. Ensure container accommodates full content.

Details: Date formats vary: '13.05.2024-14:58:28' vs '24.04.2026-21:54:30'. Some show full timestamp others don't.
Impact: Low - Confusing for users tracking worker activity.
Recommendation: Standardize date format across all tables (ISO 8601 or localized consistent format).

Details: Payout page shows column headers but no transaction data rows despite account having balance and mining activity.
Impact: Medium - Users cannot verify payout history.
Recommendation: Ensure payout data loads correctly. If no payouts yet show 'No payouts yet' message instead of empty table.

Details: Shows 'Display by 10' but only 7 workers are listed. Pagination or count logic incorrect.
Recommendation: Fix item count display to match actual data or adjust pagination settings.

Details: Active worker named '1' instead of descriptive name. Other workers have names like 'worker' 'worker1' 'worker2'.
Impact: Low - Hard to identify specific miners.
Recommendation: Enforce descriptive worker naming or auto-generate meaningful names.

Details: Section labeled 'Donat' (misspelled) with '1%' value. Purpose unclear - appears to be donation to pool but not explained.
Recommendation: Rename to 'Pool Donation' or 'Dev Fee'. Add explanatory tooltip. Fix spelling.

Details: 'Get QR code' button visible but functionality not verified during testing.
Impact: Unknown - Cannot confirm if 2FA properly implemented.
Recommendation: Test 2FA setup flow end-to-end. Ensure QR codes generate valid TOTP secrets.

Details: Only English and Russian available. Language dropdown not functional during test.
Impact: Low - Limited accessibility for non-English/Russian speakers.
Recommendation: Add more language options or ensure current ones work properly.

Issue Description: Footer links to generic app stores
Details: App Store and Google Play links point to generic store homepages not actual app.
Impact: Low - Misleading for users looking for mobile app.
Recommendation: Update links to actual app listings or remove if no mobile app exists.

Details: Company description contains '------' placeholder text instead of actual content.
Recommendation: Replace with actual company information history and mission.

Details: 'Payment is made automatically daily in the period ____' - blank field not filled.
Recommendation: Complete the payout period information or remove placeholder text.
